---
title: "Research"
layout: page
toc: false
---

::: {.intro-eyebrow}
[]{.dot} Publications & venues
:::

Most of my work sits at the intersection of **AI, distributed systems, and wireless**. Below is what's published, where, and what I'm presenting next. If anything sparks ideas, [reach out](mailto:sirera.m@northeastern.edu).

::: {.section-eyebrow}
Publications
:::

## Papers  {.no-toc}

::: {.paper-card}
[AISTATS 2025]{.paper-venue}

[Neural Point Processes for Pixel-wise Regression]{.paper-title}

[Chengzhi Shi, Gözde Özcan, **Miquel Sirera Perelló**, Stratis Ioannidis]{.paper-authors}

::: {.paper-actions}
[ PDF](./research/NPP.pdf){.paper-link}
:::
:::

::: {.paper-card}
[IEEE MILCOM 2024]{.paper-venue}

[JARVIS: Disjoint Large Language Models on Radio VLANs for Intelligent Services]{.paper-title}

[**Miquel Sirera Perelló**, Joshua Groen, Wan Liu, Stratis Ioannidis, Kaushik Chowdhury]{.paper-authors}

::: {.paper-actions}
[ PDF](./research/JARVIS.pdf){.paper-link}
[ Poster](./research/Poster_JARVIS.pdf){.paper-link}
:::
:::

::: {.paper-card}
[IEEE INFOCOM 2024]{.paper-venue}

[T-PRIME: Transformer-based Protocol Identification for Machine-learning at the Edge]{.paper-title}

[Mauro Belgiovine, Joshua Groen, **Miquel Sirera Perelló**, Chinenye Tassie, Sage Trudeau, Stratis Ioannidis, Kaushik Chowdhury]{.paper-authors}

::: {.paper-actions}
[ PDF](./research/T-PRIME.pdf){.paper-link}
:::
:::

::: {.paper-card}
[ICNC 2024]{.paper-venue}

[MEGATRON: Machine Learning in 5G with Analysis of Traffic in Open Radio Access Networks]{.paper-title}

[Mauro Belgiovine, Jerry Gu, Joshua Groen, **Miquel Sirera Perelló**, Utku Demir, Kaushik Chowdhury]{.paper-authors}

::: {.paper-actions}
[ PDF](./research/MEGATRON.pdf){.paper-link}
:::
:::

::: {.paper-card}
[BSc Thesis · 2023]{.paper-venue}

[Deep Learning for Wireless Communications]{.paper-title}

[**Miquel Sirera Perelló**, Kaushik Chowdhury, Albert Cabellos-Aparicio]{.paper-authors}

::: {.paper-actions}
[ PDF](./research/TFG.pdf){.paper-link}
:::
:::

::: {.section-eyebrow}
On the road
:::

## Conferences attended  {.no-toc}

::: {.conf-list}

::: {.conf-card}
[MILCOM 2024]{.conf-name}

[Washington, DC]{.conf-loc}

[Presented]{.conf-status}
:::

::: {.conf-card}
[ICLR 2025]{.conf-name}

[Singapore]{.conf-loc}

[Attended]{.conf-status}
:::

::: {.conf-card}
[AISTATS 2025]{.conf-name}

[Phuket, Thailand]{.conf-loc}

[Presented]{.conf-status}
:::

:::

::: {.section-eyebrow}
Indexes
:::

## Find me on  {.no-toc}

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=DF9KcekAAAAJ){.chip} · [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0005-8840-6746){.chip} · [DBLP](https://dblp.org/pid/366/4777.html){.chip} · [Semantic Scholar](https://www.semanticscholar.org/author/Miquel-Sirera/2278836383){.chip}
